mechanism: Three sub-complexes with fundamentally different supply elasticities and price dynamics make blended commodity indices incoherent expressions of any single macro view
regime_dependence: Holds in steady-state; may temporarily break during correlated macro shocks that re-correlate sub-complexes

mechanism: Roll yield collapse (-3.2% annualized) and elevated equity correlation (+0.28) make passive commodity index allocations structurally unattractive regardless of fundamental outlook
regime_dependence: Persistent since 2004 Bai-Perron structural break; no evidence of reversal

mechanism: Commodity-driven inflation triggers rate hikes which compress credit through Kaleckian balance sheet deterioration; the credit impulse turning negative is the terminal event in the reflexive chain
regime_dependence: Most clearly operative in post-financialization era (1980, 2011); less clear in pre-financialization terminations (1917, 1951)

mechanism: If fiscal subsidies (IRA/Green Deal) make transition metal demand inelastic to rate hikes, the reflexive contradiction's demand-destruction channel is weakened, potentially extending the supercycle beyond historical patterns
regime_dependence: Novel regime with no historical precedent; depends on scale of fiscal subsidies relative to interest rate sensitivity of subsidized demand

mechanism: Perceived deficit justifies greenfield sanctioning at prices requiring speculative/Ponzi financing, while the 0/8 base rate suggests the deficit may not materialize, potentially stranding investments. Conversely, zombie-zone non-sanctioning creates tightness that validates deficit narratives.
regime_dependence: Holds throughout the mining investment cycle; most acute during 12-18 year greenfield development periods

mechanism: Credit maturities arrive on fixed dates regardless of physical supply-demand outlook; leveraged producers must refinance regardless of 15-year deficit projections, potentially forcing distressed sales or production curtailment that alters realized supply
regime_dependence: Specifically acute in the 2026-2028 maturity window; diminishes after refinancing wave completes

mechanism: Agricultural spikes force extended EM tightening cycles via protein price cascade (6-24 month biological lags), transmitting commodity shocks into broader EM demand destruction with longer lag than developed markets
regime_dependence: Structural due to food's 30-50% CPI weight in EMs; amplified during periods of low exporter stocks-to-use

mechanism: OPEC+ price management creates the ceiling on hydrocarbon returns that distinguishes energy from electrification metals, enabling trifurcation between managed energy and structurally tight metals
regime_dependence: Holds while OPEC+ maintains $70-90 band; breakdown (historically ~7-10yr intervals) would temporarily re-correlate energy with other sub-complexes

mechanism: Crowded positioning creates fragile market structure where correlated macro shocks trigger simultaneous unwind across all sub-complexes, overwhelming supply-side trifurcation with demand-side correlation
regime_dependence: Risk elevated when positioning exceeds +2 sigma; demonstrated during March 19, 2026 sell-off

mechanism: Financialization shifted the commodity-equity correlation from +0.03 to +0.48; partial reversion to +0.28 creates maximum portfolio uncertainty about regime state
regime_dependence: Persistent since 2004 structural break; correlation level depends on relative commodity index AUM vs. physical market size

mechanism: The extreme gold residual ($2,000+ above model-implied value) is consistent with the monetary regime disruption interpretation, as the 1971-74 episode featured similar gold-model divergence before broader commodity breakout
regime_dependence: If gold-first sequencing is correct (n=2), the disconnect resolves when monetary regime stress resolves and the cycle transitions to demand-pull

mechanism: Irreversible aluminum substitution above the 4.2x Cu/Al ratio permanently increases copper demand elasticity at high prices, reducing the effective deficit even when copper prices correct
regime_dependence: Activated above Cu/Al ratio of 4.2x; effect accumulates over time as manufacturing capacity switches and does not reverse

mechanism: 2019-2020 CLO vintages exiting reinvestment periods create forced-selling dynamics precisely as commodity-sector maturities require refinancing, amplifying credit stress beyond what physical fundamentals would produce
regime_dependence: One-time coincidence of vintage timing and maturity clustering, specifically acute in 2026-2028 window

mechanism: Commodity positioning unwind triggers 20-40bp bull flattener as breakevens collapse, creating a synthetic recession signal that trips algorithmic models, amplified by CTA stops
regime_dependence: Applies when commodity positioning is elevated (+2 sigma) and commodity-inflation term premium is significant

mechanism: Concentrated trading house exposure in 6-8 European banks creates a financial contagion channel that correlates commodity sub-complexes during stress, as margin calls hit cross-commodity positions simultaneously
regime_dependence: Activated during sustained commodity price dislocation; dependent on bilateral OTC concentration level and bank risk appetite

mechanism: Commodity inflation raises debt service costs, forcing increased Treasury issuance, which widens term premium, amplifying the reflexive contradiction's rate channel through a self-reinforcing loop
regime_dependence: More significant at high government debt-to-GDP levels; may be dampened by central bank balance sheet operations

mechanism: FCIs signaling 'easy' while goods-producing sectors face commodity margin compression misleads the Fed's assessment of monetary transmission, compounding the dilemma of responding to policy-supported inflation
regime_dependence: Applies when equity markets rally during commodity-driven tightening cycles, creating a wedge between financial and real-economy conditions

mechanism: The 0/8 materialization rate means the price trajectories implied by greenfield project sanctioning have never been empirically validated, making the speculative finance classification even more precarious
regime_dependence: Universal across commodity cycles; applies to any deficit-justified greenfield investment decision

mechanism: Equities, forwards, and credit cannot simultaneously be correct about copper — the inconsistency reveals genuine uncertainty about deficit magnitude and indicates at least one asset class must reprice
regime_dependence: Persistent in the current pricing environment; resolves when one or more asset classes reprice to match realized fundamentals
